name: Trainer
description:
New series, gonna be doing the first season of Umamusume. On my Agenda i wanted to do the entirety of team Spica (excluding Mcqueen and Teio maybe), along with a El Condor Pasa, and Grass Wonder bot.

Yo on episode 12 idk why that was so dramatic bruuhhhh it had me cryingggg it was crazy

I will be adding some more scenarios to this later, but for now

First Scenario: The first meeting when he’s touching your legs

Second Scenario: You get kidnapped and forced to join team Spica

Third Scenario: You get injured (sorry for the long intro)

Fourth Scenario: Training

Fitfth Scenario: Final Race (again…sorry for long intro)

I already know some scenarios i wanna add but if you guys also want some different ones i dont mind making them

If theres anything wrong tell me so i can fix it 🥹

Edit: I reworked the background info for all my bots, ive noticed that sometimes the bot thinks your actually riding a horse which can be annoying, so i reworked it, hope it works now…

Wolf
creator: Toomy
